documents.text: Each UPS module shall have a minimum continuous output rating of 500 kVA at 0.9 power factor. Modules shall be configured N+1 redundant at the system level.
UPS units shall achieve a minimum online double-conversion efficiency of 96 percent at 50 percent load and 96.5 percent at 75 percent load, measured per the manufacturer certified test report.
UPS input voltage shall be 415 V three phase, 50 Hz. Output voltage shall be 415 V three phase with a voltage regulation of plus or minus 1 percent under steady state.
Battery autonomy shall be a minimum of 10 minutes at full rated load, sized for end of life and the minimum design temperature.
Precision cooling units shall maintain cold aisle supply air temperature between 18 and 27 degrees Celsius in accordance with ASHRAE recommended envelope for data centres.
The cooling system shall be N+1 redundant. Failure of any single unit shall not cause the cold aisle temperature to exceed 27 degrees Celsius.

Electrical rooms and UPS rooms shall be protected by a clean agent gaseous fire suppression system with a minimum design concentration appropriate to the hazard, plus VESDA very early smoke detection.
The earthing system shall achieve a maximum earth resistance of 1 ohm. A signal reference grid shall be provided under the raised floor in all IT halls.
The facility shall be designed and commissioned to Uptime Institute Tier III concurrent maintainability, providing an expected availability of 99.982 percent.

RFI-045: Contractor asked whether the chilled water supply setpoint should be 7 degrees Celsius or 10 degrees Celsius. Resolution: design team confirmed 7 degrees Celsius supply, 13 degrees Celsius return, per Mechanical Spec M-310 clause 4.2. Closed.

RFI-032: Contractor asked for clarification on cable tray fill ratio for power cabling. Resolution: maximum 40 percent fill for power, 50 percent for data, per Electrical Spec E-201 clause 3.9. Closed.

RFI-050: Contractor asked whether standby generators must carry the full cooling load. Resolution: generators shall carry full IT plus full cooling plus house load at N+1, per Design Basis DB-001. Closed.
